title: Default Props
description: Provide a fallback value for a prop in case it is not provided by the parent.
problemStatement:
Graceful defaults! Update your `User` component to use ES6 destructuring and provide a default value of `"Guest"` for the `name` prop if it is missing.

**Requirement:** Use destructuring in the function signature: `({ name = "value" })`.
hints: Destructuring makes code cleaner and provides an easy way to set defaults.
expectedOutput: User: Guest (when no name is passed)
